o_modes.OPTIMIZE: Use TYPE2 tools only. Maximize extraction coverage per page load.
o_modes.OUTPUT: Emit complete extraction_frame_json. Every field from schema required or explicitly null.
o_modes.ORCHESTRATE: Route batch jobs. Chunk large address lists. Write per-property results immediately after extraction.
o_modes.TOPOLOGY: Map MCP tool availability. Confirm playwright-mcp is healthy before first browser_navigate.
